meta.title: Litro — Save on every fill-up and parking spot
meta.description: Real-time fuel prices, parking availability, smart route planning and price alerts. All of Europe in a single app.

hero.title: Save on every liter.
hero.subtitle: Live fuel prices, available parking lots, and intelligent route planning. All of Europe in your pocket.

features.sectionSubtitle: Seven features that change the way you drive.

parking.title: Park without circling.
parking.body: Real-time location of parking lots across every city in Spain. Reserve your spot before you arrive.

prices.title: The lowest prices, one tap away.
prices.body: Daily updated price cards in Spain, France, Italy, Portugal, Germany, Austria and Greece.

alerts.title: Notify me when it drops.
alerts.body: Set alerts to be notified the moment fuel drops to your target price. Per station or by area.

map.title: Everything around you.
map.body: Pins for nearby gas stations and parking lots on a fluid map. Filter by brand, price or availability.

routes.title: We take you the cheapest way.
routes.body: Plan routes with up to 6 stops at the cheapest stations along the way. Save up to 15% on every trip.

favorites.title: Your spots, always close.
favorites.body: Save your favorite gas stations and parking lots. Quick access and special notifications.

savings.title: See how much you've saved.
savings.body: A counter that tracks every euro you've saved using Litro. Because every fill-up counts.

cta.title: Start saving today.
cta.subtitle: Litro is free. Download it and feel the difference on your next fill-up.
